topWPAPlays.description: Dominic Smith homers (7) on a fly ball to right field. Michael Harris II scores. Mauricio Dubón scores.
Luis Rengifo singles on a line drive to right fielder Mike Yastrzemski. Freddy Fermin scores. Jake Cronenworth scores. Fernando Tatis Jr. to 3rd.
Luis Rengifo strikes out swinging.
Ty France homers (16) on a fly ball to left field. Manny Machado scores.
Ozzie Albies homers (16) on a fly ball to right center field.
Trevor Larnach singles on a ground ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. Ryan Jeffers scores. Royce Lewis to 2nd.
Alan Roden singles on a line drive to center fielder Petey Halpin. Royce Lewis scores. Luke Keaschall to 2nd.
Luke Keaschall singles on a ground ball to left fielder Steven Kwan. Royce Lewis scores. Trevor Larnach to 3rd. Throwing error by left fielder Steven Kwan.
Josh Bell grounds into a double play, second baseman Travis Bazzana to shortstop Brayan Rocchio to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Ryan Jeffers out at 2nd. Josh Bell out at 1st.
Patrick Bailey homers (5) on a fly ball to right field.
George Springer singles on a ground ball to left fielder Chandler Simpson. Yohendrick Piñango scores.
Alejandro Kirk singles on a ground ball to third baseman Junior Caminero. Ernie Clement scores. George Springer to 3rd.
Yandy Díaz singles on a line drive to right fielder Yohendrick Piñango. Hunter Feduccia scores.
Vladimir Guerrero Jr. singles on a line drive to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr. Myles Straw scores.
Yohendrick Piñango doubles (8) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Victor Mesa Jr.
Tyler Locklear homers (1) on a line drive to left field. Adrian Del Castillo scores.
Adrian Del Castillo doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Max Kepler to 3rd.
Jordan Walker doubles (22) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt. JJ Wetherholt scores.
Max Kepler grounds into a double play, pitcher Michael McGreevy to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Blaze Jordan. Gabriel Moreno out at 2nd. Max Kepler out at 1st.
Corbin Carroll triples (12) on a sharp fly ball to center fielder Nathan Church.
James Outman homers (4) on a fly ball to right center field. Dillon Dingler scores. Kerry Carpenter scores.
Salvador Perez grounds into a double play, first baseman Spencer Torkelson to shortstop Kevin McGonigle to pitcher Kyle Finnegan. Vinnie Pasquantino out at 2nd. Salvador Perez out at 1st.
Dillon Dingler doubles (22) on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Isaac Collins. Hao-Yu Lee scores.
Isaac Collins homers (6) on a fly ball to right field. Michael Massey scores.
Kerry Carpenter singles on a line drive to right fielder Nick Loftin. Dillon Dingler to 3rd.
